text:
Pushing in background. The multi-turn capture is at `claude_captures/run_20260407_191222/`. Load it in the visualizer to see how the context grows across turns — the message count jumps from 1 → 7 → 13 → 17 as each turn adds user message + assistant response + tool results.

The `build_viz_data.py` now also detects turn boundaries (the `turns` array in the JSON), which the visualizer could use to draw horizontal dividers in the flow map between turns.
